title: viola maritima
intro: Viola maritima, also known as sea pansy, is a type of flowering plant that grows in coastal areas and is characterized by its delicate purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viola maritima include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Viola maritima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
